first_half.summary: Wrexham struggled defensively in the first half, conceding four goals while only managing to score once. The away team took an early lead and continued to dominate the match.

second_half.summary: The second half saw Wrexham attempt to recover but they were unable to capitalize on their chances. The away team scored one more goal to solidify their dominance.

decisive_moment.why_decisive: This early goal set the tone for the match, giving the away team confidence and putting Wrexham on the back foot.

overall_story: Wrexham faced a challenging match against the away team, conceding four goals in the first half. Despite managing to score once, they were unable to recover in the second half, ultimately losing 1-5.
